headline: Víctor Muñoz — update
body: 🚨💣 The exclusive news out of nowhere: Víctor Muñoz will be new Liverpool player on contract until June 2032. Hijack completed tonight and #LFC to pay €40m to Osasuna (and €20m will go to Real Madrid). https://t.co/KqguZESoyA
text:
🚨💣 The exclusive news out of nowhere: Víctor Muñoz will be new Liverpool player on contract until June 2032.

Hijack completed tonight and #LFC to pay €40m to Osasuna (and €20m will go to Real Madrid). https://t.co/KqguZESoyA
